mdRecord.dcterms:title: Criminal Warrants, Justice of the Peace: Commonwealth vs William O. Sumner
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Commonwealth vs William O. Sumner Offense: Assault and Battery Victim: J.H. Graham Complainant: J.H. Epperly Recorded in Floyd County Courthouse 07.02.1887 Guilty Fine:$2.50 Court Cost: $2.50
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Court Records
Warrants (Law)
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
